name: Damage Ctrl
description: Damage Ctrl, consisting of Bayley, Dakota Kai, and Iyo Sky. Dominant WWE tag team who keep the women’s division on their heels. The group has three of the most powerful superstars in the company, Bayley being the veteran competitor, Dakota being the ruthless kicker, and Iyo being the rookie highflyer who’s accomplished a lot in Japan, and is looking to show off her talent in WWE.
creator: TrainBoy_Liam
